description: A feature spec template for a measurable performance improvement: numeric baseline and target, measurement method, workload definition, bottleneck evidence, constraints, regression risks, before/after validation, and rollback.

variables.name: targetMetric
variables.description: The single metric the optimization is judged by (e.g. "p95 latency", "throughput", "peak memory").

variables.name: workload
variables.description: The workload under which the metric is measured (e.g. "steady-state production traffic", "nightly batch import").

examples: specbridge template apply performance-optimization --name checkout-latency --var targetMetric="p95 latency"
